name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state



TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
           /\ \A i \in 1..N: state[i] \in {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
          \/ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
          \/ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes, messages

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}
  /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"YES", "NO", "UNDECIDED"}]
  /\ messages \in [Participants -> Seq({["type" |-> {"Prepare")]

Init ==
  /\ state = "INIT"
  /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "UNDECIDED"]
  /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> <<["type" |-> "Prepare", "content" |-> "YES"]>>]

Prepare ==
  /\ state = "INIT"
  /\ state' = "PREPARED"

VoteYes ==
  /\ state = "PREPARED"
  /\ \E p \in Participants : votes[p] = "UNDECIDED"
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "YES"]
  /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p] = Append(messages[p], ["type" |-> "VoteYes", "content" |-> "YES"])]

VoteNo ==
  /\ state = "PREPARED"
  /\ \E p \in Participants : votes[p] = "UNDECIDED"
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "NO"]
  /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p] = Append(messages[p], ["type" |-> "VoteNo", "content" |-> "NO"])]

Commit ==
  /\ state = "PREPARED"
  /\ \A p \in Participants : votes[p] = "YES"
  /\ state' = "COMMITTED"
  /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p] = Append(messages[p], ["type" |-> "Commit", "content" |-> "COMMIT"])]

Abort ==
  /\ state = "PREPARED"
  /\ \E p \in Participants : votes[p] = "NO"
  /\ state' = "ABORTED"
  /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p] = Append(messages[p], ["type" |-> "Abort", "content" |-> "ABORT"])]

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = i

TakeForks(i) == 
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == 
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = Left(i), ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "hungry"
    /\ CanEat(i)
    /\ TakeForks(i)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "eating"
    /\ PutForks(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count, ConsumedItem

(* q is a sequence of length K, holding the queue contents *)
(* head and tail are indices into q *)
(* count is the number of items in the queue *)

TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq[1..K][Int]
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ count \in 0..K

Init == 
    /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == 
    /\ count < K
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = NewItem]
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ count' = count + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

ConsumerAction == 
    /\ count > 0
    /\ ConsumedItem' = q[head]
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ count' = count - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

Next == 
    \/ ProducerAction
    \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



TypeOK ==
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Servers
  /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = None
  /\ state = "Follower"

(* Candidate starts election *)
StartElection ==
  /\ state = "Follower"
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
  /\ votedFor' = Self
  /\ state' = "Candidate"

(* Receive vote request *)
ReceiveVoteRequest ==
  /\ state' = state
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor' = votedFor

(* Receive vote response *)
ReceiveVoteResponse ==
  /\ state' = state
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor' = votedFor

(* Become leader after majority *)
BecomeLeader ==
  /\ state = "Candidate"
  /\ state' = "Leader"

Next ==
  \/ StartElection
  \/ ReceiveVoteRequest
  \/ ReceiveVoteResponse
  \/ BecomeLeader

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == 
  /\ readers \in Nat
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

AcquireRead == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReleaseRead == 
  /\ readers > 0
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

AcquireWrite == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

ReleaseWrite == 
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == 
  \/ AcquireRead
  \/ ReleaseRead
  \/ AcquireWrite
  \/ ReleaseWrite

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels

VARIABLES state, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, recorded
State == [data: Nat, snapshot: BOOLEAN]
ChannelState == [data: Seq(Nat), snapshot: BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> [data |-> 0, snapshot |-> FALSE]]
    /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> [data |-> <<>>, snapshot |-> FALSE]]
    /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
    /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
    /\ recorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Sending a data message from process i to process j *)
SendData(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ j \in 1..N
    /\ i # j
    /\ \E msg \in 1..N : /\ msg \in 1..N
                         /\ channelState[(i, j)].data = Append(channelState[(i, j)].data, msg)
                         /\ state[i].data' = state[i].data + 1
                         /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, recorded>>

(* Sending a marker from process i to process j *)
SendMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ j \in 1..N
    /\ i # j
    /\ markerSent[(i, j)] = FALSE
    /\ markerSent'[(i, j)] = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channelState, markerReceived, recorded>>

(* Receiving a data message on channel (i, j) *)
ReceiveData(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ j \in 1..N
    /\ i # j
    /\ channelState[(i, j)].data # <<>>
    /\ \E msg \in 1..N : /\ msg = Head(channelState[(i, j)].data)
                         /\ channelState[(i, j)].data' = Tail(channelState[(i, j)].data)
                         /\ state[j].data' = state[j].data + 1
                         /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, recorded>>

(* Receiving a marker on channel (i, j) *)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ j \in 1..N
    /\ i # j
    /\ markerReceived[(i, j)] = FALSE
    /\ markerReceived'[(i, j)] = TRUE
    /\ IF recorded[j] = FALSE
       THEN /\ recorded' = [ recorded EXCEPT ![j] = TRUE ]
            /\ channelState'[(i, j)] = [ channelState[(i, j)] EXCEPT !.snapshot = TRUE ]
            /\ \E k \in 1..N : /\ k # j
                               /\ SendMarker(j, k)

    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, recorded>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \E i, j \in 1..N : /\ i # j
                           /\ SendData(i, j)
    \/ \E i, j \in 1..N : /\ i # j
                           /\ SendMarker(i, j)
    \/ \E i, j \in 1..N : /\ i # j
                           /\ ReceiveData(i, j)
    \/ \E i, j \in 1..N : /\ i # j
                           /\ ReceiveMarker(i, j)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, recorded>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
    /\ channelState \in [Channels -> ChannelState]
    /\ markerSent \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerReceived \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == token \in 1..N

Next == token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
    /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, ballot, chosen, value

TypeOK ==
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot : Nat, value : Nat, chosen : BOOLEAN]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot : Nat, value : Nat, chosen : BOOLEAN]]

Init ==
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0, chosen |-> FALSE]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0, chosen |-> FALSE]]

Prepare(j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot + 1
  /\ proposers[j].value' = proposers[j].value
  /\ proposers[j].chosen' = proposers[j].chosen
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot', value |-> proposers[j].value, chosen |-> proposers[j].chosen]

          acceptors[i]]
  /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> proposers[j] \ {ballot, value, chosen} \cup 
        [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot', value |-> proposers[j].value', chosen |-> proposers[j].chosen']]

Accept(j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].chosen' = proposers[j].chosen
  /\ proposers[j].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot
  /\ proposers[j].value' = proposers[j].value
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [ballot |-> acceptors[i].ballot, value |-> proposers[j].value, chosen |-> TRUE]

          acceptors[i]]
  /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> proposers[j] \ {ballot, value, chosen} \cup 
        [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot', value |-> proposers[j].value', chosen |-> proposers[j].chosen']]

Next ==
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Prepare(j)
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Accept(j)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS FileSize
VARIABLES ackedChunks, chunks, file, lostChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq(1..FileSize)
    /\ chunks \in Seq(1..ChunkSize)
    /\ sentChunks \in FiniteSet(1..FileSize)
    /\ retransmitCount \in FiniteSet(1..FileSize)
    /\ ackedChunks \in FiniteSet(1..FileSize)
    /\ lostChunks \in FiniteSet(1..FileSize)

Init ==
    /\ file = [i \in 1..FileSize |-> i]
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..ChunkSize |-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ lostChunks = {}

SendChunk ==
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {chunk}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![chunk] = 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks, lostChunks>>

RetransmitChunk ==
    /\ chunk \in sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[chunk] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![chunk] = retransmitCount[chunk] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks, lostChunks>>

AckChunk ==
    /\ chunk \in sentChunks
    /\ chunk \notin ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {chunk}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, retransmitCount, lostChunks>>

LoseChunk ==
    /\ chunk \in sentChunks
    /\ chunk \notin ackedChunks
    /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks \cup {chunk}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in 1..FileSize :
        /\ chunk \notin sentChunks
        /\ SendChunk
    \/ \E chunk \in sentChunks :
        /\ chunk \notin ackedChunks
        /\ \E action \in {RetransmitChunk, AckChunk, LoseChunk} :
            action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks, lostChunks>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE flag, turn

  (* non-critical section *)
od



  (* critical section *)

  (* non-critical section *)
od
*)

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> -> FALSE]
        /\ turn \in 1..2

Next == 
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
      /\ turn' = 2
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> 
        /\ infected = <<>> 

Next == 
  /\ known' = known
  /\ infected' = 
        IF Len(infected) = 0 THEN <<>>

          LET 
            i == CHOOSE i \in 1..N : i \notin infected
            j == CHOOSE j \in 1..N : j \notin infected
          IN 
            Append(infected, <<i, j>>)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Client

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
       /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
       \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq free

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, broker

(* TypeOK ensures all variables have the correct type *)
TypeOK == 
    subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET Subscriber] /\
    messages \in [Topic -> Seq(Message)]

(* Init sets up an empty broker *)
Init == 
    subscribers = [t \in Topic |-> {}] /\
    messages = [t \in Topic |-> <<>>]

(* Next describes the broker's behavior *)
Next == 
    \/ (* A subscriber registers for a topic *)
        \E s \in Subscriber : \E t \in Topic :
            subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![t] = subscribers[t] \cup {s}] /\
            messages' = messages
    \/ (* A publisher posts a message on a topic *)
        \E m \in Message : \E t \in Topic :
            subscribers' = subscribers /\
            messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], m)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in [ {0,1} -> BOOLEAN ]

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

Init ==
  /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next ==
  \E n \in Node :
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][n] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<counts>>

Total(n) ==
  Sum(counts[][n])

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
